mapper.select: SELECT A.LoginId, A.EmployeeNum /*사용자ID*/ FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER A WHERE 1=1 AND EmployeeNum = #{LOGIN_ID}

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier DESC ) as RNUM, TI.Identifier, TI.ItemID, TIA1.AttrTypeCode, TIA1.PlainText, TI.Identifier +' '+ TIA1.PlainText AS ItemName, TIA2.AttrTypeCode AS AT14Code, TIA2.PlainText As TCode, TIA3.AttrTypeCode AS AT37Code, TIA3.PlainText As SystemType, TATA.Link, TIA4.AttrTypeCode AS AT40Code, TIA4.PlainText AS Parameter, CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN TATL.Value ELSE ISNULL(TIA3.PlainText, '') END SystemTypeText From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 ON TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA1.ItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA2.ItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 ON TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' And TIA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA3.ItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA4 ON TIA4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00040' And TIA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA4.ItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA ON TATA.AttrTypeCode = TIA1.AttrTypeCode And TATA.ItemClassCode = (Select ClassCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = TI.ItemID) Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL on TATL.AttrTypeCode = TIA3.AttrTypeCode AND TATL.LovCode = TIA3.LovCode AND TATL.LanguageID = '1042' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT on TIA3.AttrTypeCode = TAT.AttrTypeCode Where TI.ItemID = #{itemID}
